languages.description: List of programming languages and frameworks required for the job

skills.description: List of skills required for the job. Ignore same type skills.

experience.description: Experience level required for the job (in years)

experience_level.description: Experience level required for the job (e.g., Junior{0-2y}, Mid{3-5y}, Senior{5+y})

salary_min.description: Minimum salary offered for the job

salary_max.description: Maximum salary offered for the job

deadline.description: Deadline for the job application in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). If not directly found, look for any date in the job post.

job_type.description: Type of job (e.g., Onsite, Remote, Hybrid)

vacancy.description: Number of vacancies available for the job. Directly mentioned in the job posting.

benefits.description: List of benefits offered for the job in short form. No need to include generic one like 'Other facilities'.

category.description: Category of the job based on the description

industry.description: Broad industry name based on the content (e.g., engineering, business, finance, healthcare, education, retail, manufacturing). Keep it concise (1-2 words).
